required_elements.element: Did the officer ask about firearms
Did the suspect use firearms during the incident that occurred
Did the suspect use firearms in previous incidents
Did the suspect make threats— real or implied— to use firearms during the incident that occurred
Did the suspect make threats— real or implied— to use firearms in previous incidents
Does the suspect have access to firearms
Details of the firearms, including location
Did the victim express fear about the suspect’s access to firearms
How the victim's fear about the suspect's access to firearms was captured in the report
Is this individual prohibited from possessing firearms due to a conviction for a misdemeanor crime of domestic violence
Is this individual prohibited from possessing firearms due to a qualifying order of protection
Is this individual prohibited from possessing firearms due to a dishonorable discharge from the military
Time of the call, including time of incident, time of dispatch, and time of arrival
Elements of the crime(s) articulated to meet state and/or federal laws
Observations upon approach
Scene(s) concisely described/diagramed
Photos taken and details recorded
Relationship of the parties identified
History of the relationship, including frequency of any violence, intimidation, and threats
All witnesses interviewed and documented
Outcry witness interviewed
Comprehensive information about the suspect gathered
Weapons/objects used
Emotional state of the victim
Emotional state of the suspect
Arrest made
Evidence collected
All injuries (visible and non-visible) documented
Injuries existing or new
Trauma documented in the report
All threats clearly documented
Victim’s fear effectively documented
Use of coercion and/or force articulated
Property damage, theft, or burglary
Suspect exam conducted
Stalking behaviors identified in the report
Suspect's pre-incident behaviors documented
Victim reported being strangled (choked)
Details of strangulation (hands, ligature, etc.)
Victim asked about possible strangulation
Proper protocol followed if the suspect was not on the scene
Active warrants out for the suspect
Suspect's history of protection orders
Valid protection order in place and verified
Other identified victims
Case coded properly
Ongoing sexual abuse by the suspect
All spontaneous statements captured
Victim incapacitated or incapable of giving consent
Drugs or alcohol used by the victim, including amounts and timespan
Victim believes they were drugged
Blood and urine collected if drug-facilitated sex assault is suspected
Mental and/or physical incapacities documented
Officers assisted the victim with safety planning
Victim provided with information about local service providers
Forensic examination of the victim conducted
Threat/risk assessment tool used with the victim
Firearms/weapons confiscated, including grounds for confiscation
